Container.Name: transcode-worker
Container.Overview: Video and audio mutation worker. Wraps ffmpeg and mkvtoolnix to perform policy-driven remux, re-encode, and track operations. Never deletes original audio. Requires review gate confirmation before destructive operations.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: transcode-worker HTTP port. POST /jobs to submit a transcode job.

Config.Name: Work Directory
Config.Description: Intake, review, and scratch staging area.

Config.Name: Domestic TV
Config.Description: Domestic TV share. Worker may write remuxed output here.

Config.Name: International TV
Config.Description: International/Anime/JAV share. Worker may write remuxed output here.

Config.Name: CATALOG_API_URL
Config.Description: Base URL of catalog-api for state updates.

Config.Name: PREFER_NVENC
Config.Description: Set to true to prefer NVIDIA NVENC hardware encoding. Requires --gpus all in ExtraParams.
